form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 4th over 1609m at this track, beaten 2.5 m by Lake Time (2:03.30) in G on November 28 at $1.75. Will find this a tough assignment; prefer later.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 4th over 1609m at this track, beaten 2.5 m by Lake Time (2:03.30) in G on November 28 at $1.75. Will find this a tough assignment; prefer later.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 4.5 m at this track (1:56.30) beating Major Hill in G on April 6 at $4.45 at the bell was leading. Two runs back 4th over 1609m at Rideau Carleton Raceway was 3rd- at the bell, beaten 9 m by Caviart Seacrest (1:54.10) on August 17 at $13.60. Well placed, should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 4.5 m at this track (1:56.30) beating Major Hill in G on April 6 at $4.45 at the bell was leading. Two runs back 4th over 1609m at Rideau Carleton Raceway was 3rd- at the bell, beaten 9 m by Caviart Seacrest (1:54.10) on August 17 at $13.60. Well placed, should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 6th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 7th- beaten 9 m by Axel Bovino (1:56.20) in G on April 8 at $17. Showed ability the run before when he posted a big 4 m win at this track (1:58.30) beating Kerwood Kid in G on March 31 at $2.85 at the bell was leading. One of the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Failed to impress last start; 6th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 7th- beaten 9 m by Axel Bovino (1:56.20) in G on April 8 at $17. Showed ability the run before when he posted a big 4 m win at this track (1:58.30) beating Kerwood Kid in G on March 31 at $2.85 at the bell was leading. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 6th over 1609m at Mohawk Park, at the bell was 6th- beaten 10 m by Catitude (1:54.20) in G on April 6 at $8.80. At the previous start 8th over 1609m at Mohawk Park was 6th- at the bell, beaten 8 m by Poppa Joe (1:54.30) in HCP G on March 29 at $3.50. Watch for a far better effort this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 6th over 1609m at Mohawk Park, at the bell was 6th- beaten 10 m by Catitude (1:54.20) in G on April 6 at $8.80. At the previous start 8th over 1609m at Mohawk Park was 6th- at the bell, beaten 8 m by Poppa Joe (1:54.30) in HCP G on March 29 at $3.50. Watch for a far better effort this time.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into sixth behind Bajan Firefly at Mohawk Park over 1609m in a 4yo on December 27 at $15.90. Cannot be left out of calculations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming after a spell of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into sixth behind Bajan Firefly at Mohawk Park over 1609m in a 4yo on December 27 at $15.90. Cannot be left out of calculations.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start won by 1.5 m as favourite at this track (1:58.00) beating Lucky Dancer in G on April 8 at $1.10 at the bell was leading. Faces a stiffer test this time.

formComments.title: TAB
